article_title: System.Threading.Channels：.NET 内置的生产者-消费者管道，不需要 RabbitMQ
core_theme: 用 System.Threading.Channels 在 .NET 里搭建带背压的生产者-消费者管道，把突发流量变成有序消费
reader_takeaway: 学会用 Channels 替代 Task.Run 做后台处理，掌握有界队列、背压和平滑关停
summary_angle: 把 Task.Run 的坑 → 有界 Channel 的背压 → BackgroundService 消费 → 平滑关停，压成一条可读的管道封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: Task.Run fire-and-forget: no concurrency limit, CPU pinned, dropped work on restart
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧：多个散乱的 Task.Run 箭头砸向一个过载的齿轮，齿轮冒烟

information_blocks.source_anchor: Bounded Channel with Wait mode: capacity 100, backpressure when full, producers await
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面中央：一个有界的管道结构，管壁上有容量标记 '100'，入口有背压阀，排队的项有序进入

information_blocks.source_anchor: BackgroundService consumer with ReadAllAsync, graceful drain on shutdown
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面右侧：有序的消费管线，多个消费者从 Channel 中拉取，管道末端有平滑关停标识

main_metaphor: 一条带压力阀的工业管道：左侧混乱的输入被 Channel 收束成有序流，经限流阀进入右侧稳定的消费端
primary_subject: 一条水平方向的有界管道，中间有容量标记和背压阀
subject_action: 左侧散乱的箭头流入管道入口，通过限流阀后有序地流向右侧消费端
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: steampunk adventure illustration, brass mechanisms, gears, goggles, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中；管道/阀门/限流的机械隐喻天然适配蒸汽朋克的黄铜齿轮和工业管道视觉语言
style_safety_note: 蒸汽朋克风为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮验证管道隐喻和背压阀是否成立、蒸汽朋克风格是否到位
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article, aspect ratio 2.35:1
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration for a .NET tutorial. Theme: System.Threading.Channels as a bounded pipeline with backpressure for producer-consumer pattern. The reader should quickly feel the transformation from chaotic Task.Run fire-and-forget to an orderly bounded channel pipeline.

Summary angle: Chaotic unbound Task.Run items entering from left → a bounded Channel pipe with a pressure valve (backpressure) in the center → orderly consumption by BackgroundService on the right.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject (the channel pipeline) and 3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Left beat: scattered task arrows hitting an overloaded smoking gear, labeled 'Task.Run'
- Center beat: a bounded mechanical pipe with capacity gauge showing limit, a brass pressure valve regulating flow, labeled 'Channel'
- Right beat: orderly pipeline with consumer gears processing items one by one, labeled 'BackgroundService'

Main metaphor: An industrial steam-age pipeline with a pressure valve. Chaotic input is channeled through a bounded pipe with a regulator, flowing into stable orderly consumption.
Subject: A horizontal bounded pipeline structure with brass pressure valve and capacity markings at center.
Composition/framing: diagonal forward push composition. Items flow from top-left chaos into center bounded channel, then exit bottom-right orderly into consumer processing.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: steampunk adventure illustration, brass mechanisms, gears, goggles, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as a tutorial infographic cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm brass copper, dark iron gray, warm golden industrial light, muted blue-green accents.
Visible text policy: allow only 2-3 short labels from information blocks, each at most 20 chars. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake charts.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, code rain, neon skyscrapers, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue glow, HUD overlays, fake dashboards, fake terminals, fake charts, digital UI elements.
